metadata.name: NHANES Combined Question Flow v2
metadata.description: Branching questionnaire aligned to the current HalfFull screening feature summary and model-runner contract.
metadata.frontend_answer_contract: Submit a flat dictionary keyed by field_id. Values should be the NHANES numeric codes for coded questions, or numbers for numeric entry questions.
notes: The questionnaire uses NHANES-coded answers where official categories exist; optional checkup fields are included for model-required numeric inputs that are not NHANES questionnaire variables.
The frontend should send a flat dictionary keyed by field_id.
The transformer script should create all alias columns and *_miss flags automatically.
Perimenopause replaces the older menopause label.

question_groups.title: Optional recent checkup and lab values

questions.title: Optional values from recent labs or checkup
questions.help_text: These are not NHANES questionnaire questions, but they are needed to populate some production model columns. Leave blank if unknown; the mapper will create missingness flags automatically.

fields.label: Total cholesterol (mg/dL)
HDL cholesterol (mg/dL)
LDL cholesterol (mg/dL)
Triglycerides (mg/dL)
Fasting glucose (mg/dL)
Glucose (mg/dL)
Urine albumin-creatinine ratio (mg/g)
Total protein (g/dL)
White blood cell count (1000 cells/uL)

derived_features.rule: 1 if gender == 2 else 0 if gender is known else null
1 if ALQ151 == 1 or ALQ170 helper > 0; 0 if both available and negative; null otherwise
1 if any alcohol-risk signal is present from ALQ111/130/151/170 helper; 0 if all known and negative; null otherwise
1 if SMQ040 in {1,2}; 0 if SMQ040 == 3; null otherwise
1 if PAQ620 == 1 or PAQ665 == 1; 0 if both known and neither yes; null otherwise
1 if PAQ605 helper == 1 or PAQ650 == 1; 0 if both known and neither yes; null otherwise
Auto-generated as 1 when the corresponding base feature is null/blank, else 0
